subcategory: Feature showcase section with icon cards
use_cases: Displaying product features on a landing page
Highlighting key capabilities in a SaaS dashboard
Showcasing service offerings on a marketing site
Presenting tool features in a product walkthrough
ai_summary: A modern feature showcase component with card-based layout for displaying product capabilities. Features clean minimalist design with hover interactions and icon-driven feature cards. Part of the brijr design system, commonly used on SaaS landing pages and product documentation sites to communicate key features to potential customers.
